title: Gravestone Dungeons Resource Pack Add-on
description: Resource Pack for the Gravestone Dungeons Data Pack.
body:
Gravestone Dungeons Required Add-on

Gravestone Dungeons is a data pack which adds many large and small dungeons with bosses, loot and many items to the vanilla game.

This resource pack enhances the custom items and features of my data pack with unique textures and visuals. 
It includes:

- Custom arrows

- Spell scrolls and magical runes

- Special weapons and tools with distinct designs

- Unique enchanted book and story book textures 

- Boss drop items with their own textures 

- Spell circles and ritualistic magic effects

- It also includes medieval-themed music for the Bard NPC’s custom music discs

..and much more.

Every texture is crafted to improve the magic and adventure of the data pack.

This is the resource pack, needed for the data pack to work as intended and only changes added items from the data pack, not vanilla items.

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravestone-dungeons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravestone-dungeons)~~~~

It's not working without the data pack and it's not a stand-alone texture pack! 

The resource pack should be listed first during installation.
